response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack experience, Linux fluency, open-source contributions (GISCollective), and some teaching/leadership exposure through workshops and dojos. However, this is a Head of Development role requiring C1 German (candidate self-reports only Basic), formal team leadership/management track record, and UML/architecture-management depth — all of which are weak or absent. The German gap alone is a hard blocker for the stated requirement.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with Linux, open-source, and architecture exposure across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Founder of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating end-to-end ownership, K8s deployment, and long-term technical stewardship
Proven mentoring/teaching footprint through Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos, and conference talks
concerns: German listed as only Basic — fails the explicit C1 minimum required for the role
No explicit experience as a Head of Development or formal people-manager leading an interdisciplinary team
UML modeling and formal requirements-management expertise are not evidenced in the resume

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal engineering leadership/management role
Strong open-source, Linux, and architecture engineering background
